/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmirela_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so -o libmirela_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so CMakeFiles/mirela_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/mirela_interfaces/msg/detail/aruco_transforms__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mirela_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/mirela_interfaces/msg/detail/line_info__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mirela_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp/mirela_interfaces/msg/detail/photo_info__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
